title: The Shadowed Man
description: Adds a entity that wants to hunt you down in the dark
body:
this mod adds a new entity that stalks you hunts you and sneeks up on you 

it could spawn anywhere no matter what 

it messes with you be careful because it might be nearby trying to stalk and hunt you down 

this is not dweller ai this is original ai










[this is my take on psychological horror]
